evals.prompt: Give me a quick look at this new GitHub repo and tell me whether it looks worth investigating further.
evals.expected_output: A response that satisfies the listed expectations.
expectations: The report states the requested and achieved depth
The report does not overclaim confidence for a young project

evals.prompt: I want to adopt a skill inside a multi-owner marketplace. Evaluate the host and the specific item separately.
evals.expected_output: A response that satisfies the listed expectations.
expectations: The report distinguishes evaluation boundary and nested target
The workflow does not collapse the analysis to the item only

evals.prompt: Audit this repository for production use, but do not clone it locally.
evals.expected_output: A response that satisfies the listed expectations.
expectations: The report marks deeper phases as blocked
The report lowers confidence because clone-backed work was refused

evals.prompt: Assess this repo, but it contains repo-local agent files like CLAUDE.md and .claude/settings.json.
evals.expected_output: A response that satisfies the listed expectations.
expectations: The report mentions untrusted agent artifacts
